calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-02-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the the Presiding Judge Dept. for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Bob Balian.
Steven O'Neal, Esq. for Plaintiff: R.A.H. Corporation dba national Car Rental.
Plaintiff's Witness: Robert Heymann, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendant: Catherine U. Villanueva.
Exhibit 1- Rental Car Agreement------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Repair Estimate-----------------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- Copy of Check 397 in the amount of $4,772.54----ID/EVID.
Exhibit 4- Towing Invoice #307907----------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 3- One page of 5 photographs-------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant as follows:
Principal $5,315.50
Prejudgment Interest $900.82
Attorney's Fees $875.00
Costs $276.76, for a Total of $7,368.08
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits and to prepare Judgment.

July 2, 2007
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.
